title: Payment Gateway Latency Spike
description: High latency was detected in the payment gateway after a spike in transaction volume. Customers reported slow checkout completion.
actions_taken: Scaled the payment API cluster, cleared queue backlog, and restarted the gateway service.
root_cause: Insufficient service capacity and retry storm due to transient upstream timeouts.

title: POS Service Crash on Store Terminal
description: A point-of-sale service crashed on a store terminal after repeated session timeouts, impacting transaction processing.
actions_taken: Restarted the POS service, collected service logs, and validated session store connectivity.
root_cause: Session store connectivity interruption caused by network glitch.

title: Database Replication Lag
description: Database replication lag increased beyond thresholds, affecting read replica freshness.
actions_taken: Validated replication topology, cleared IO queue, and increased replica resources.
root_cause: Sustained high write pressure on primary database node.
